title: Betterer Torches
body:
This is an update to [**Better Torches**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-torches-5099357/), a resource pack that:
- gives torches an animated texture
- makes 1st & 3rd person view torch 3d
- gives wall torches holders

**Betterer Torches** changes to original pack:
- added copper torch
- fixed and updated redstone torch to post-1.21.2 (and added og redstone torch version)

**There are 4 variants of this pack:**
1. Default
2. Og torch
3. Og redstone torch
4. Og torch and redstone torch
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54edc776de2a3ef4d3cf337bac405fb95b6ce8d1.png)
